summary: Abstract base class for both Reactive and Heartbeat agents. Defines AgentStatus enum (INITIALIZING, ACTIVE, SAFE_MODE, AWAIT_RESYNC, BROTHERHOOD_MOURNING, SILENT_GUARDIAN, HALTED). AgentState dataclass holds agent_id, status, memory_root_hash, last_event_id, cycle_count. BaseAgent ABC requires boot() and get_state() implementations. Status transitions logged via _transition() method.
